_meta: TODO: professional translation review required (Dagbani). Placeholder strings retain {variable} tokens.
spam_call_warning: Wuhibu: Bole ŋɔ ni tooi nyɛ yɛlimaŋli (spam).
spam_sms_warning: Wuhibu: SMS ŋɔ ni tooi nyɛ yɛlimaŋli (spam).
otp_fraud_warning: A nyari OTP banki sani saha shɛli a ni be bole ni. Di ni tooi nyɛ namfɔŋ. Miri ka a yɛli sokam shɛm la.
url_blocked: Ti zaŋ wɛbsaiti ŋɔ kpa zuɣu a tibili zuɣu.
fraud_alert: Ti nya bidipuli shɛŋa di bi viɛla a akɔnta zuɣu.
send_with_care_prompt: Ti ni gbibi ligri ŋɔ simma {duration}. A ni tooi tahi li saha kam.
return_to_sender_confirm: Tahimi yɛla: Ti labisi GHS {amount} n-ti {recipient}.
diky_step1: Ti nya tuumi shɛli di bi viɛla. A mi {recipient} ŋun deeri ligri ŋɔ?
diky_step2: Tahimi yɛla: A nuu mi n-ti soli ka GHS {amount} ligri ŋɔ chaŋ?
diky_step3: Bahi yɛla. Sabi YENI ka ti zaŋ chaŋ, bee AAYI ka ti che.
ask_me_first_prompt: A nuu mi n-ti soli ka GHS {amount} ligri tuumi ŋɔ chaŋ?
verified_business_badge: Tuma kpariba shɛba bɛ ni tahi: {business_name}
passive_protection_enrolled: A foon zuɣu mali tibili. Sabi STOP ka yi puuni.
transaction_held: Ti yiɣisira a tuumi ŋɔ a tibili zuɣu.
block_confirmed: Ti zaŋ noli {msisdn} kpa. Sabi UNBLOCK ka ti yooi li.
